📋 Everything you need to know
📅 When
Thu Jun 25
From 15:00 till late
📍 Where
Biotop Komárov
K Lávce, Brno-Horní Heršpice ↗
🎫 Entry
Wristband
Get yours at the gate
👨‍👩‍👧 Family
+1 & kids welcome
No dogs allowed
📍 Tap the pins on the map to explore the venue 💜
⏰ Agenda
15:00
Arrival & wristband check-in 💜
Biotop staff hands out purple wristbands at the gate.
15:00
Food & drinks service begins 🍽️
Grilled specialties (meat & veggie). Foodtruck opens. Tent buffet continuously replenished.
16:00
Welcome speech by Jakub Nytra 🎤
Quick toast and we're off.
18:00
Špekáčky at the campfire 🔥🌭
Roast your own. Bring your inner scout.
19:00
Last call ☕ + 🍔
Coffee stand and foodtruck close.
20:00
Party moves to the boat 🚤
Food & drinks transfer to the party boat. Official party kick-off (unofficially: whenever you're ready 😎).
22:00
DJ Michal Fulier on deck 🎧
Volume up. Purple summer night begins.
03:00
Party ends ✨
Venue closes. For the truly dedicated ones who made it this far.
🎉 What to look forward to
🍔Foodtruck15:00–19:00

Grilled & street food. Highlights:

  • Mini beef burgers (gluten-free buns available)
  • Mini halloumi burgers (gluten-free buns available)
  • Falafel or tofu wrap 🌱 vegan
  • Couscous with grilled marinated tempeh, veggies & herbs
  • Texas pulled pork & beef brisket (sliced fresh by the chef)
⛺Tent buffet15:00–20:00

Plenty of options for everyone:

  • Falafel wrap 🌱 vegan
  • Mini pita with chicken gyros, tzatziki, tomato, onion
  • Tortilla baked with chicken, cheddar, veggies & dressing (kid-friendly)
  • Baked tortillas with grilled veggies, herb pesto & feta 🥬 veggie
  • Sliced veggies: cucumber, tomato, pepper
  • Šopský salad / tzatziki
  • Bread (gluten-free available)
  • Mini chicken & pork schnitzels
  • Fries with mayo / tartar / ketchup
☕Coffee stand15:00–19:00

Top-quality coffee, the full menu:

  • Iced coffee
  • Espresso tonic
  • Babyccino for the little ones
  • Plus all the classics
🍺Drinks standNext to the foodtruck
  • Plzeň
  • Radegast
  • Aperol Spritz
  • Gin & Tonic
  • Elderflower lemonade
  • Mango lemonade
  • Water with lemon & mint
🚤Party boatFrom 20:00

Self-service drink station. Pour your own.

  • 🍺 Beer: Svatecká 11
  • 🥤 Kofola
🍦Ice creamShow your wristband

Small soft-serve ice cream. Show your purple wristband at the stand.

🔥Campfire & špekáčkyFrom 18:00

Špekáčky over an open fire. Bring your inner scout, kids welcome.

🎨Kids programAll afternoon

Supervised animation with Paw Patrol visit:

  • 📸 Photo opportunities with Paw Patrol
  • 🏃 Sports stations & movement games
  • 💦 Aqua activities & water fun
  • 🎈 Water battle with balloons & water pistols
  • 🏅 Fun competitions and team challenges
  • 🎉 Music, dancing & summer vibes
🏊Swimming in the pondAll day

Natural biotope pond, no chlorine. Bring swimsuit & towel.

🏐Volleyball courtOpen during event

Beach volleyball court on the north side. Grab teammates and play.

🚋 How to get there
🚊
By tram
Tram 12 to Komárov stop. Then ~15 min walk.
🚌
By bus
Bus 49 from Úzká to Kšírova stop. Then ~7 min walk.
🚗
By car
Parking at Biotop Komárov. If full, nearby street parking works too. Carpool encouraged.
🧳 What to bring
👥
Your +1s
Registered ones
🩱
Swimsuit
Pond awaits
🏖️
Towel
Essential
🧴
Sunscreen
SPF on duty
🧺
Blanket
Optional
💜
Good vibes
Mandatory
❓ FAQ
Who's invited?
All Purple people, your registered +1 partner, and your kids. We've got activities for the little ones too.
What's included with the wristband?
Unlimited access to the swimming pond, restrooms, and showers throughout the event. Plus everything food and drink related, including the ice cream stand.
Can I bring my dog?
Unfortunately no. The venue is a public swimming area and dogs aren't permitted on site. Sorry, and thanks for understanding.
Why Biotop Komárov?
It ticks all the boxes: pool to kick off summer, a large fenced area just for us, a campfire spot for špekáčky, and party mode on without disturbing anyone.
Until when does it go?
From 15:00 until late evening. Or till 3:00 AM for the truly dedicated ones.
💜 See you on June 25
Cheers to 15 years 💜
💗
